parts.text: /review Final blocker-only review after latest fix for cancelRequestedAt + missing providerDeploymentId race in workspace-deployment-runner.ts. Focus on terminal-state correctness under concurrency.

1100:   let outputBundle = sourceBundle;

1106:     }

1130:   await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'running', {

1133:     sourceBundleKey,
1134:     result: successResultTemplate,
1135:   });
1136: 
1137:   let createResult: {
1138:     providerDeploymentId: string;
1139:     status: 'queued' | 'running' | 'succeeded' | 'failed' | 'cancelled';
1140:     deployedUrl: string | null;

1142:   if (deployment.providerDeploymentId) {

1179:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {

1190:     });

1192: 
1193:   let providerStatus: WorkspaceDeployStatusResult = {

1195:     deployedUrl: createResult.deployedUrl,

1198:   let cancelAccepted = false;
1199:   const maxPollAttempts = parseIntegerString(env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PROVIDER_MAX_POLLS, 120, 1, 600);
1200:   const pollIntervalMs = parseIntegerString(env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PROVIDER_POLL_INTERVAL_MS, 1500, 50, 10000);
1201:   for (let attempt = 0; attempt < maxPollAttempts; attempt += 1) {
1202:     await throwIfDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId).catch(async (error) => {
1203:         if (error instanceof CancelRequestedError) {
1204:           if (!cancelAttempted) {

1206:             let cancel;
1207:             try {
1208:               cancel = await provider.cancelDeployment(createResult.providerDeploymentId);
1209:             } catch (providerCancelError) {

1212:                 throw new QueueRetryError('Provider cancel status is temporarily unavailable; retry requested');
1213:               }
1214:               throw new PolicyError(providerError.code, providerError.message);
1215:             }
1216:             cancelAccepted = cancel.accepted;
1217:             await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1218:               workspaceId,
1219:             deploymentId,
1220:             eventType: 'deployment_provider_cancel_requested',

1225:             });
1226:             if (!cancel.accepted) {
1227:               await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1228:                 workspaceId,
1229:                 deploymentId,
1230:                 eventType: 'deployment_cancel_rejected',
1231:                 payload: {
1232:                   providerDeploymentId: createResult.providerDeploymentId,
1233:                   duringPolling: true,
1234:                 },
1235:               });
1236:             }
1237:           }
1238:           if (cancelAccepted) {
1239:             return;
1240:           }
1241:         return;
1242:       }
1243:       throw error;
1244:     });
1245: 
1246:     if (providerStatus.status === 'succeeded' || providerStatus.status === 'failed' || providerStatus.status === 'cancelled') {
1247:       break;
1248:     }
1249: 
1250:     await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, pollIntervalMs));
1251:     try {
1252:       providerStatus = await provider.getDeploymentStatus(createResult.providerDeploymentId);
1253:     } catch (error) {
1254:       const providerError = normalizeProviderError(error);
1255:       if (isRetryableProviderError(providerError.code, providerError.message)) {
1256:         throw new QueueRetryError('Provider status endpoint is temporarily unavailable; retry requested');
1257:       }
1258:       throw new PolicyError(providerError.code, providerError.message);
1259:     }
1260:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1261:       workspaceId,
1262:       deploymentId,
1263:       eventType: 'deployment_provider_status',
1264:       payload: {
1265:         providerDeploymentId: createResult.providerDeploymentId,
1266:         status: providerStatus.status,
1267:         deployedUrl: providerStatus.deployedUrl,
1268:       },
1269:     });
1270:   }
1271: 
1272:   if (providerStatus.status === 'queued' || providerStatus.status === 'running') {
1273:     if (cancelAccepted) {
1274:       throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment cancel requested while running; wait for active attempt to reconcile');
1275:     }
1276:     throw new PolicyError(

1278:       `Provider deployment did not reach terminal state within polling window (${maxPollAttempts} attempts)`
1279:     );
1280:   }
1281: 
1282:   if (providerStatus.status === 'failed') {
1283:     throw new PolicyError(providerStatus.errorCode ?? 'provider_deploy_failed', providerStatus.errorMessage ?? 'Provider deployment failed');
1284:   }
1285: 
1286:   if (providerStatus.status === 'cancelled') {

1288:     return;
1289:   }
1290: 
1291:   const deployedUrl = providerStatus.deployedUrl ?? createResult.deployedUrl;
1292:   if (!deployedUrl) {
1293:     throw new PolicyError('provider_deploy_failed', 'Provider deployment did not return a deployed URL');
1294:   }
1295: 
1296:   const finishedAt = new Date().toISOString();
1297:   const successResult = {
1298:     ...successResultTemplate,
1299:     url: deployedUrl,

<content>1510:   if (!claimed) {
1511:     const existing = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1512:     if (existing && existing.status !== 'queued' && existing.status !== 'running') {
1513:       try {
1514:         await reconcileWorkspaceSummaryForTerminalDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1515:       } catch (reconcileError) {
1516:         if (shouldRetryWorkspaceDeploymentError(reconcileError)) {
1517:           throw new QueueRetryError('Terminal deployment reconciliation failed; retry requested');
1518:         }
1519:       }
1520:       return;
1521:     }
1522: 
1523:     if (existing?.status === 'queued' && existing.cancelRequestedAt) {
1524:       await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested');
1525:       return;
1526:     }
1527: 
1528:     if (existing?.status === 'running') {
1529:       if (isRunningDeploymentStale(existing.startedAt)) {
1530:         if (existing.cancelRequestedAt) {
1531:           await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested_stale');
1532:           return;
1533:         }
1534:         await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'failed', {
1535:           workspaceId,
1536:           errorCode: 'deployment_stale_timeout',
1537:           errorMessage: 'Deployment execution exceeded stale running timeout and was failed for recovery',
1538:         });
1539:         await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1540:           workspaceId,
1541:           deploymentId,
1542:           eventType: 'deployment_failed',
1543:           payload: {
1544:             code: 'deployment_stale_timeout',
1545:             message: 'Deployment execution exceeded stale running timeout and was failed for recovery',
1546:           },
1547:         });
1548:         await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
1549:           deploymentId,
1550:           status: 'failed',
1551:           errorCode: 'deployment_stale_timeout',
1552:           errorMessage: 'Deployment execution exceeded stale running timeout and was failed for recovery',
1553:         });
1554:         return;
1555:       }
1556: 
1557:       if (existing.cancelRequestedAt) {
1558:         if (existing.providerDeploymentId) {
1559:           try {
1560:             const requestPayload = await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId);
1561:             const providerName = getWorkspaceDeployProviderName(requestPayload?.provider, env);
1562:             const provider = createWorkspaceDeployProvider(providerName, env);
1563:             const providerStatus = await provider.getDeploymentStatus(existing.providerDeploymentId);
1564: 
1565:             if (providerStatus.status === 'cancelled') {
1566:               await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'provider_cancelled');
1567:               return;
1568:             }
1569: 
1570:             if (providerStatus.status === 'succeeded') {
1571:               if (!existing.sourceSnapshotSha256 || !existing.sourceBundleKey) {
1572:                 throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment success metadata not yet available; retry requested');
1573:               }
1574:               const deployedUrl = providerStatus.deployedUrl ?? existing.deployedUrl ?? null;
1575:               if (!deployedUrl) {
1576:                 throw new QueueRetryError('Provider deployment succeeded but no deployed URL is available yet; retry requested');
1577:               }
1578:               const finishedAt = new Date().toISOString();
1579:               const existingResult =
1580:                 existing.result && typeof existing.result === 'object' && !Array.isArray(existing.result)
1581:                   ? (existing.result as Record<string, unknown>)
1582:                   : {};
1583:               const requestPayload = await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId);
1584:               const requestProvenance =
1585:                 requestPayload?.provenance && typeof requestPayload.provenance === 'object' && !Array.isArray(requestPayload.provenance)
1586:                   ? (requestPayload.provenance as Record<string, unknown>)
1587:                   : {};
1588:               const existingArtifact =
1589:                 existingResult.artifact && typeof existingResult.artifact === 'object' && !Array.isArray(existingResult.artifact)
1590:                   ? (existingResult.artifact as Record<string, unknown>)
1591:                   : {};
1592:               const existingProvenance =
1593:                 existingResult.provenance && typeof existingResult.provenance === 'object' && !Array.isArray(existingResult.provenance)
1594:                   ? (existingResult.provenance as Record<string, unknown>)
1595:                   : {};
1596:               const successResult = {
1597:                 ...existingResult,
1598:                 url: deployedUrl,
1599:                 artifact: {
1600:                   sourceBundleKey: existing.sourceBundleKey,
1601:                   sourceSnapshotSha256: existing.sourceSnapshotSha256,
1602:                   outputBundleSha256:
1603:                     typeof existingArtifact.outputBundleSha256 === 'string' ? existingArtifact.outputBundleSha256 : null,
1604:                   outputDir: typeof existingArtifact.outputDir === 'string' ? existingArtifact.outputDir : null,
1605:                 },
1606:                 provenance: {
1607:                   ...existingProvenance,
1608:                   workspaceId,
1609:                   taskId:
1610:                     typeof requestProvenance.taskId === 'string'
1611:                       ? requestProvenance.taskId
1612:                       : (existingProvenance.taskId ?? null),
1613:                   operationId:
1614:                     typeof requestProvenance.operationId === 'string'
1615:                       ? requestProvenance.operationId
1616:                       : (existingProvenance.operationId ?? null),
1617:                   trigger:
1618:                     typeof requestProvenance.trigger === 'string'
1619:                       ? requestProvenance.trigger
1620:                       : typeof existingProvenance.trigger === 'string'
1621:                         ? existingProvenance.trigger
1622:                         : 'manual',
1623:                 },
1624:                 rollbackOnFailure: parseBoolean(requestPayload?.rollbackOnFailure, true),
1625:                 reconciled: true,
1626:                 fromCancelRequested: true,
1627:               };
1628:               const succeededUpdate = await env.DB
1629:                 .prepare(
1630:                   `UPDATE workspace_deployments
1631:                    SET status = 'succeeded',
1632:                        deployed_url = ?,
1633:                        provider_deployment_id = ?,
1634:                        source_snapshot_sha256 = ?,
1635:                        source_bundle_key = ?,
1636:                        cancel_requested_at = NULL,
1637:                        result_json = ?,
1638:                        error_code = NULL,
1639:                        error_message = NULL,
1640:                        finished_at = ?,
1641:                        updated_at = ?
1642:                    WHERE id = ?
1643:                      AND workspace_id = ?
1644:                      AND status = 'running'
1645:                      AND cancel_requested_at IS NOT NULL`
1646:                 )
1647:                 .bind(
1648:                   deployedUrl,
1649:                   existing.providerDeploymentId,
1650:                   existing.sourceSnapshotSha256,
1651:                   existing.sourceBundleKey,
1652:                   JSON.stringify(successResult),
1653:                   finishedAt,
1654:                   finishedAt,
1655:                   deploymentId,
1656:                   workspaceId
1657:                 )
1658:                 .run();
1659: 
1660:               if ((succeededUpdate.meta?.changes ?? 0) === 0) {
1661:                 throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment reconciliation lost state race; retry requested');
1662:               }
1663:               await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1664:                 workspaceId,
1665:                 deploymentId,
1666:                 eventType: 'deployment_succeeded',
1667:                 payload: {
1668:                   deployedUrl,
1669:                   reconciled: true,
1670:                   fromCancelRequested: true,
1671:                 },
1672:               });
1673:               await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
1674:                 deploymentId,
1675:                 status: 'succeeded',
1676:                 deployedUrl,
1677:                 deployedAt: finishedAt,
1678:                 errorCode: null,
1679:                 errorMessage: null,
1680:               });
1681:               return;
1682:             }
1683: 
1684:             if (providerStatus.status === 'failed') {
1685:               const errorCode = providerStatus.errorCode ?? 'provider_deploy_failed';
1686:               const errorMessage = providerStatus.errorMessage ?? 'Provider deployment failed';
1687:               const failedAt = new Date().toISOString();
1688:               const failedUpdate = await env.DB
1689:                 .prepare(
1690:                   `UPDATE workspace_deployments
1691:                    SET status = 'failed',
1692:                        error_code = ?,
1693:                        error_message = ?,
1694:                        finished_at = COALESCE(finished_at, ?),
1695:                        updated_at = ?
1696:                    WHERE id = ?
1697:                      AND workspace_id = ?
1698:                      AND status = 'running'
1699:                      AND cancel_requested_at IS NOT NULL`
1700:                 )
1701:                 .bind(errorCode, errorMessage, failedAt, failedAt, deploymentId, workspaceId)
1702:                 .run();
1703: 
1704:               if ((failedUpdate.meta?.changes ?? 0) === 0) {
1705:                 throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment failed reconciliation lost state race; retry requested');
1706:               }
1707:               await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1708:                 workspaceId,
1709:                 deploymentId,
1710:                 eventType: 'deployment_failed',
1711:                 payload: { code: errorCode, message: errorMessage },
1712:               });
1713:               await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
1714:                 deploymentId,
1715:                 status: 'failed',
1716:                 errorCode,
1717:                 errorMessage,
1718:               });
1719:               return;
1720:             }
1721:           } catch {
1722:             // Best-effort reconciliation only.
1723:           }
1724:         }
1725: 
1726:         throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment cancel requested while running; wait for active attempt to reconcile');
1727:       }
1728: 
1729:       throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment is already running; defer redelivery');
1730:     }
1731:     return;
1732:   }
1733: 
1734:   try {
1735:     const flags = await loadRuntimeFlags(env);
1736:     if (!flags.workspaceDeployEnabled) {
1737:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'failed', {
1738:         workspaceId,
1739:         errorCode: 'workspace_deploy_disabled',
1740:         errorMessage: 'Workspace deploy is disabled',
1741:       });
1742:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1743:         workspaceId,
1744:         deploymentId,
1745:         eventType: 'deployment_failed',
1746:         payload: { code: 'workspace_deploy_disabled', message: 'Workspace deploy is disabled' },
1747:       });
1748:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
1749:         deploymentId,
1750:         status: 'failed',
1751:         errorCode: 'workspace_deploy_disabled',
1752:         errorMessage: 'Workspace deploy is disabled',
1753:       });
1754:       return;
1755:     }
1756: 
1757:     await executeWorkspaceDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1758:   } catch (error) {
1759:     const deployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1760:     if (deployment && deployment.status !== 'queued' && deployment.status !== 'running') {
1761:       try {
1762:         await reconcileWorkspaceSummaryForTerminalDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1763:       } catch (reconcileError) {
1764:         if (shouldRetryWorkspaceDeploymentError(reconcileError)) {
1765:           throw new QueueRetryError('Terminal deployment reconciliation failed; retry requested');
1766:         }
1767:       }
1768:       return;
1769:     }
1770:

1952: export async function runWorkspaceDeploymentInlineWithRetries(
1953:   env: Env,
1954:   workspaceId: string,
1955:   deploymentId: string,
1956:   maxCycles = 8
1957: ): Promise<void> {
1958:   async function reconcileInlineCancelRequestedRunningDeployment(): Promise<boolean> {
1959:     const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1960:     if (!latest || latest.status !== 'running' || !latest.cancelRequestedAt) {
1961:       return false;
1962:     }
1963: 
1964:     if (!latest.providerDeploymentId) {
1965:       await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested_inline');
1966:       return true;

1968: 
1969:     try {
1970:       const requestPayload = await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId);

1972:       const provider = createWorkspaceDeployProvider(providerName, env);
1973:       const providerStatus = await provider.getDeploymentStatus(latest.providerDeploymentId);

1989:         const latestResult =

1991:             ? (latest.result as Record<string, unknown>)
1992:             : {};
1993:         const requestPayload = await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId);
1994:         const requestProvenance =
1995:           requestPayload?.provenance && typeof requestPayload.provenance === 'object' && !Array.isArray(requestPayload.provenance)
1996:             ? (requestPayload.provenance as Record<string, unknown>)
1997:             : {};
1998:         const latestArtifact =
1999:           latestResult.artifact && typeof latestResult.artifact === 'object' && !Array.isArray(latestResult.artifact)
2000:             ? (latestResult.artifact as Record<string, unknown>)
2001:             : {};
2002:         const latestProvenance =
2003:           latestResult.provenance && typeof latestResult.provenance === 'object' && !Array.isArray(latestResult.provenance)
2004:             ? (latestResult.provenance as Record<string, unknown>)
2005:             : {};
2006:         const successResult = {
2007:           ...latestResult,
2008:           url: deployedUrl,
2009:           artifact: {
2010:             sourceBundleKey: latest.sourceBundleKey,

2025:               typeof requestProvenance.trigger === 'string'

2028:                   ? latestProvenance.trigger

2034:         };

2042:                  source_bundle_key = ?,

2091:       if (providerStatus.status === 'failed') {

2096:           .prepare(

2099:                  error_code = ?,
2100:                  error_message = ?,

2102:                  updated_at = ?
2103:              WHERE id = ?
2104:                AND workspace_id = ?
2105:                AND status = 'running'

2107:           )
2108:           .bind(errorCode, errorMessage, failedAt, failedAt, deploymentId, workspaceId)

2110: 
2111:         if ((failedUpdate.meta?.changes ?? 0) === 0) {
2112:           return false;
2113:         }
2114:         await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
2115:           workspaceId,
2116:           deploymentId,
2117:           eventType: 'deployment_failed',
2118:           payload: { code: errorCode, message: errorMessage },
2119:         });
2120:         await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
2121:           deploymentId,
2122:           status: 'failed',
2123:           errorCode,
2124:           errorMessage,
2125:         });
2126:         return true;
2127:       }
2128:     } catch {
2129:       // Best-effort inline reconciliation only.
2130:     }
2131: 
2132:     return false;
2133:   }
2134: 
2135:   async function recoverInlineRunningDeployment(): Promise<boolean> {
2136:     const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
2137:     if (!latest || latest.status !== 'running') {
2138:       return false;
2139:     }
2140: 
2141:     if (latest.cancelRequestedAt) {
2142:       return false;
2143:     }
2144: 
2145:     if (latest.attemptCount > latest.maxRetries) {
2146:       return false;
2147:     }
2148: 
2149:     const retryUpdate = await env.DB
2150:       .prepare(
2151:         `UPDATE workspace_deployments
2152:          SET status = 'queued',
2153:              started_at = NULL,
2154:              finished_at = NULL,
2155:              error_code = 'retry_scheduled',
2156:              error_message = ?,
2157:              updated_at = ?
2158:          WHERE id = ?
2159:            AND workspace_id = ?
2160:            AND status = 'running'
2161:            AND cancel_requested_at IS NULL`
2162:       )
2163:       .bind(
2164:         'Recovered inline deployment retry after transient failure',
2165:         new Date().toISOString(),
2166:         deploymentId,
2167:         workspaceId
2168:       )
2169:       .run();
2170: 
2171:     if ((retryUpdate.meta?.changes ?? 0) === 0) {
2172:       return false;
2173:     }
2174: 
2175:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
2176:       workspaceId,
2177:       deploymentId,
2178:       eventType: 'deployment_retry_scheduled',
2179:       payload: { attemptCount: latest.attemptCount, maxRetries: latest.maxRetries, recoveredInline: true },
2180:     });
2181:     return true;
2182:   }
2183: 
2184:   for (let cycle = 0; cycle < maxCycles; cycle += 1) {
2185:     let retryableErrorRaised = false;
2186:     try {
2187:       await processWorkspaceDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
2188:     } catch (error) {
2189:       if (error instanceof QueueRetryError && /cancel requested while running/i.test(error.message)) {
2190:         if (cycle < maxCycles - 1) {

2192:           continue;
2193:         }
2194: 
2195:         const reconciled = await reconcileInlineCancelRequestedRunningDeployment();
2196:         if (!reconciled) {

2198:             workspaceId,

2265: ): Promise<{ deployment: WorkspaceDeploymentResponse | null; updated: boolean }> {
2266:   const now = new Date().toISOString();
2267:   const queuedResult = await db
2268:     .prepare(
2269:       `UPDATE workspace_deployments
2270:        SET status = 'cancelled',
2271:            cancel_requested_at = COALESCE(cancel_requested_at, ?),
2272:            finished_at = COALESCE(finished_at, ?),
2273:            error_code = NULL,
2274:            error_message = NULL,
2275:            updated_at = ?
2276:        WHERE id = ? AND workspace_id = ? AND status = 'queued'`
2277:     )
2278:     .bind(now, now, now, deploymentId, workspaceId)
2279:     .run();
2280: 
2281:   const runningResult = await db
2282:     .prepare(
2283:       `UPDATE workspace_deployments
2284:        SET cancel_requested_at = COALESCE(cancel_requested_at, ?),
2285:            updated_at = ?
2286:        WHERE id = ? AND workspace_id = ? AND status = 'running' AND cancel_requested_at IS NULL`
2287:     )
2288:     .bind(now, now, deploymentId, workspaceId)
2289:     .run();
2290: 
2291:   const deployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(db, workspaceId, deploymentId);
2292: 
2293:   return {
2294:     deployment,
2295:     updated: (queuedResult.meta?.changes ?? 0) > 0 || (runningResult.meta?.changes ?? 0) > 0,
2296:   };
2297: }
2298: 
2299: export async function appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(
2300:   db: D1Database,
2301:   input: {
2302:     workspaceId: string;
2303:     deploymentId: string;
2304:     eventType: string;
2305:     payload: unknown;
2306:   }
2307: ): Promise<number> {
2308:   const seqResult = await db
2309:     .prepare(
2310:       'UPDATE workspace_deployments SET last_event_seq = last_event_seq + 1 WHERE id = ? AND workspace_id = ? RETURNING last_event_seq'
2311:     )
2312:     .bind(input.deploymentId, input.workspaceId)
2313:     .first<{ last_event_seq: number }>();
2314: 
2315:   if (!seqResult) {
2316:     throw new Error(`Failed to allocate event sequence for workspace deployment ${input.deploymentId}`);
2317:   }
2318: 
2319:   const seq = Number(seqResult.last_event_seq);

(Showing lines 2090-2319 of 2575. Use offset=2320 to continue.)

state.title: runWorkspaceDeploymentInlineWithRetries\(

parts.text:
**Blockers**
- `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:1964` force-cancels `running + cancelRequestedAt + missing providerDeploymentId` in inline reconciliation, which is still a terminal-state correctness bug under the exact race you called out. If provider create succeeded remotely but the worker crashed before persisting `providerDeploymentId`, `runWorkspaceDeploymentInlineWithRetries` eventually hits `reconcileInlineCancelRequestedRunningDeployment()` (`packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:2195`) and unconditionally marks `cancelled` (`cancel_requested_inline`) without any provider-state check. That can overwrite a real remote success with a local cancelled terminal state.  

Recommended fix: treat missing `providerDeploymentId` as non-terminal/unknown here too (same policy as the queue path), and defer with retry/reconcile instead of finalizing to `cancelled` until you can prove terminal state (or stale-timeout policy explicitly applies).
